user_query:
I’m preparing a greenlight meeting and want a profit-first agenda. Please do the following using only the local files provided:

Inputs:
- Meeting constraints: input/meeting.yaml
- Proposal files: every CSV under input/proposals/

Requirements:
1) Inspect the input/proposals/ directory and aggregate all proposal rows from every CSV file found there. Record which files you processed and how many rows came from each.
2) Read meeting_date and agenda_slots from input/meeting.yaml. For this task, meeting_date will control eligibility and due dates.
3) Filter the aggregated proposals to only those where:
   - status == "pending"
   - ms_ready_date is on or before meeting_date (inclusive)
4) For each eligible proposal, compute:
   - projected_profit = est_units * (list_price - unit_cost) - (advance + marketing)
   - total_investment = advance + marketing + (est_units * unit_cost)
   - roi = projected_profit / total_investment
   - risk_flag = "risk" if (prob_success < 0.6) OR (projected_profit <= 0), otherwise "ok"
5) Rank the eligible proposals by projected_profit descending. Break ties by roi descending, then by project_id ascending.
6) Select the top agenda_slots proposals to appear on the agenda.
7) Save a ranked agenda CSV to output/agenda/greenlight_agenda.csv with columns (in this order):
   rank,project_id,title,editor,projected_profit,roi,prob_success,risk_flag,ms_ready_date
8) Draft meeting notes and action items to output/notes/greenlight_action_items.md with:
   - A header showing the meeting date (from input/meeting.yaml)
   - A section "Agenda (Top Proposals)" listing each selected proposal in rank order with two action items per proposal:
     • Owner: Finance — Prepare 1-page profitability brief; Due: two calendar days before meeting_date
     • Owner: Editorial — Confirm manuscript readiness; Due: ms_ready_date
   - A section "Risks to Flag (Not on Agenda)" listing any eligible but non-selected proposals where risk_flag == "risk" with a one-line reason: either "low success probability" (prob_success < 0.6) or "non-positive projected profit" (projected_profit <= 0).
9) Write an inventory file to output/logs/proposal_inventory.txt listing each processed CSV (relative path) and the number of rows ingested from it.

Deliverables and paths:
- output/agenda/greenlight_agenda.csv (ranked agenda of top proposals)
- output/notes/greenlight_action_items.md (meeting notes with action items)
- output/logs/proposal_inventory.txt (which proposal files were processed and row counts)

Make sure the agenda and notes reflect only the filtered, eligible proposals and that ranking and tie-breaks follow the rules above. The action item due dates must be derived exactly as specified from meeting_date and ms_ready_date. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
